item.title: Paddy_Boyland: Patrick Boyland @Paddy_Boyland · 44s Jarrad Branthwaite seen leaving the stadium on crutches. Moyes said he was "worried
item.description: Patrick Boyland @Paddy_Boyland · 44s Jarrad Branthwaite seen leaving the stadium on crutches. Moyes said he was "worried" by the defender's injury but tests will determine full severity of the issue nytimes.com Everton boss David Moyes hopeful of having Jarrad Branthwaite fit for Arsenal The 23-year-old was substituted 83 minutes into the recent home victory over Burnley last time out. 2 89

item.title: OptaAnalyst: Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 1min The woodwork has been struck four times in this match - the joint most in any Premier L
item.description:
Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 1min The woodwork has been struck four times in this match - the joint most in any Premier League game this season.
And there are 17 minutes of normal time still to be played here 1 3 12 1 mil
